title: I'm Getting Married to a Girl I Hate in My Class
overview: Saito is getting married to his classmate. But it's not just any classmate—it's his least favorite girl in school and archnemesis, Akane Sakuramori! And so begins a romcom of two stubborn love birds forced into marriage against their will.

title: A New Life
overview: Saito and Akane secretly begin their new life together but soon run into a mountain of conflicting lifestyle preferences. Can the two find a way to meet in the middle?

title: My Wife
overview: After resolving their differences, Saito and Akane begin to enjoy spending time together and all seems to be smooth sailing. Until one day, when Akane works herself too hard and gets sick, leaving Saito to take care of her.

title: Night Attack
overview: With Shise's discovery of their secret, Saito and Akane scramble to keep others from finding out. Meanwhile, Akane encounters haunting events at home.

title: I Won't Lose
overview: Himari reveals to Akane that she has a crush on Saito. While Akane agrees to help her get closer to Saito, she can't shake a nagging feeling.

title: Newlywed's First Date
overview: Akane's revelation of a painful past prompts Saito to cheer her up by planning a day out together.

title: The Ring
overview: Saito works his first part-time job to get a gift for Akane, but things go awry when it goes missing.

title: Senpai
overview: A mysterious girl suddenly appears before Saito and he soon finds out that she's Akane's little sister.

title: Little Sister's Heartache
overview: Maho continues to tempt Saito, but Saito learns the truth behind her actions when she falls ill.

title: Girlfriend (Tentative)
overview: Saito and Akane become a rumor at school, so they come up with a plan as diversion.

title: Voice
overview: Saito is invited to a party hosted by Tenryu, and Akane must stay home alone overnight.

title: I'm Getting Married to a Guy I Hate in My Class
overview: Akane reveals her past encounter with Saito and confronts Himari in this Season 1 finale!
